title: barleria venenata
intro: Barleria venenata, also known as the poisonous firecracker or firecracker bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. It is believed to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The leaves and roots of the plant are used in herbal preparations, often in the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
